import type * as fsStat from '@nodelib/fs.stat'; import type { Dirent, ErrnoException } from '../types'; export interface ReaddirAsynchronousMethod { (filepath: string, options: { withFileTypes: true; }, callback: (error: ErrnoException | null, files: Dirent[]) => void): void; (filepath: string, callback: (error: ErrnoException | null, files: string[]) => void): void; } export interface ReaddirSynchronousMethod { (filepath: string, options: { withFileTypes: true; }): Dirent[]; (filepath: string): string[]; } export declare type FileSystemAdapter = fsStat.FileSystemAdapter & { readdir: ReaddirAsynchronousMethod; readdirSync: ReaddirSynchronousMethod; }; export declare const FILE_SYSTEM_ADAPTER: FileSystemAdapter; export declare function createFileSystemAdapter(fsMethods?: Partial<FileSystemAdapter>): FileSystemAdapter;
